daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy today, Cap. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to trust your gut more than your spreadsheet. Something unexpected might just be exactly what you needed.
daily.love: Your vibe is magnetic right now. Whether you're single or coupled up, people are drawn to your authenticity. Don't play it cool—let them see the real you. That's where the magic happens.
daily.career: Mercury's got your back with creative solutions you didn't see coming. This is a great day to pitch that idea or have the conversation you've been rehearsing. Your timing feels right.
daily.health: Your body's asking for more play and less planning today. Movement that feels good—not obligatory—is calling to you. Listen to what actually energizes you instead of what you think should.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy invites you to soften your edges, Capricorn. You've been grinding hard, and the universe is gently nudging you to find magic in the mundane. Trust your intuition over your spreadsheets—it's got something real to tell you.
weekly.love: Vulnerability is your superpower rn. Whether single or coupled up, let people see the real you beneath that composed exterior. A genuine conversation could shift everything. Your authenticity is literally magnetic this week.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing, but don't rush to execute everything at once. This is peak brainstorming energy. Collaborate with someone who thinks differently than you do—their perspective is the missing puzzle piece you didn't know you needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system is asking for more slowness. Consider ditching the hustle mentality for a few days and lean into rest as a form of productivity. Even five minutes of stillness can recalibrate your whole vibe. Listen to what your body actually wants.
